name: @atrib/cloudflare-live-client-proof
description: Live Cloudflare Agent.addMcpServer proof for atrib client attribution.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @atrib/mcp build && pnpm --filter @atrib/verify build && pnpm --filter @atrib/agent build && tsc --noEmit
scripts.deploy: pnpm --filter @atrib/mcp build && pnpm --filter @atrib/verify build && pnpm --filter @atrib/agent build && wrangler deploy --secrets-file .tmp/secrets.json
scripts.proof: pnpm --filter @atrib/mcp build && pnpm --filter @atrib/verify build && pnpm --filter @atrib/agent build && tsx scripts/run-live-client-proof.ts
